name: Londontown Terrace Crab Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion rings and celery; sauté until onions are soft and golden.
2. Arrange half of the crabmeat, cheese (choose sharp cheddar, Swiss, or another preferred variety), and onion-celery mixture alternately on the bottom of the pastry shell.
3. Top with remaining ingredients.
4. In a bowl, beat eggs, cream, salt, pepper, and half-and-half until well combined; pour over filling.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) in a hot oven for about 30-40 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool slightly before cutting.
Tuna, salmon, shrimp, or flaked fish may be substituted for crabmeat.
